title: Ralph Marinaro III
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Ralph Marinaro III
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

biography: I am a CNU alumnus and graduated with a B.S. in Applied Physics before attending University of Glasgow where I received a Ph.D. in Experimental Nuclear Physics and am also a current Honorary Research Fellow.
education_entries: Ph D in Experimental Nuclear Physics, University of Glasgow
BS in Applied Physics, Christopher Newport University
research_interests: As a nuclear physicist, I participate in research for experimental Hall A and C collaborations at Jefferson Lab. This research explores nucleon structure via electron scattering experiments, and requires continuous development of new particle detector systems.
